items.title: Trump tells US negotiators 'not to rush' into deal with Iran
items.summary: The deal under discussion would involve a 60-day ceasefire extension during which the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened, according to US media.

items.title: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
items.summary: The Oreshnik missile, which reportedly travels over 10 times the speed of sound, was used, Russia has confirmed.

items.title: Turkish riot police storm opposition offices after leaders ousted
items.summary: Officers forced their way into the building days after the party vowed to defy a court ruling removing its leaders.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 批歐巴馬與伊朗達成「爛協議」  川普：我不會像他一樣
items.summary: 美國總統川普23日表示，美國與伊朗針對結束中東衝突的初步協議已大致談妥，不過雙方目前對於核議題的處理方式仍有歧異。川普24日在「真實社群」（Truth Social）發文強調，如...…

items.title: 不只武器級！美官員：川普要伊朗交出全部2000公斤濃縮鈾
items.summary: 川普政府對於在數日內與伊朗簽署協議抱持樂觀態度，將避免戰爭進一步升級，但協議尚未最終定案。1名美國高層官員24日證實，作為協議的一部分，伊朗方面「原則上同意處理」其高濃縮鈾庫存；...…

items.title: 美伊針對「核協議」仍有分歧 魯比歐坦言：不可能72小時內達成
items.summary: 美國總統川普23日表示，美國與伊朗針對結束中東衝突的初步協議已大致談妥，美國國務卿魯比歐則指出，有望在24日之後正式宣布美伊針對「結束戰爭」達成協議。不過雙方目前對於核議題的處理...…
